task_name: Fire panel status — verify no faults, no zone disabled, all green indicators
acceptance_criteria: All zones green; no fault/disable/silence indicators; battery indicator OK
notes: Look for amber/red LEDs; if any zone disabled note reason in field

task_name: Walk emergency exits — confirm doors unlocked, unobstructed, exit signs illuminated
acceptance_criteria: Every exit door operates from inside without key; pathway clear; exit sign lit
notes: Common failure: housekeeping stores boxes blocking exit. Immediate fix required.

task_name: Fire extinguisher visual — pressure gauge in green, pin & seal intact, not blocked
acceptance_criteria: All extinguishers: gauge green, pin sealed, mounting secure, signage above
notes: Capture extinguisher count per floor in notes. Refill due-date on label.

task_name: Hose reel inspection — hose intact, nozzle present, valve operational
acceptance_criteria: Hose unkinked, no cuts/cracks, nozzle attached, isolation valve open

task_name: Smoke detector functional test — test one zone weekly so all zones tested monthly
acceptance_criteria: Detector activates on test spray/magnet; zone shows on panel; resets cleanly
notes: Coordinate with nursing in advance to avoid panic. Mute panel during test.

task_name: Emergency light test — kill mains briefly, verify auto-on for 90 sec minimum
acceptance_criteria: All emergency lights illuminate within 5 sec of mains failure and stay lit ≥90s
notes: Test only outside critical patient hours.

task_name: Extinguisher pressure check — record gauge reading per unit, log refill due-dates
acceptance_criteria: All units in green band; record next refill date; flag any in red band

task_name: Fire pump test run — start jockey + main pump, verify pressure rise, run 10 min
acceptance_criteria: Jockey starts at preset low pressure; main pump starts on demand; no leaks at gland

task_name: Hydrant flow test — open valve, confirm pressure, no leakage at couplings
acceptance_criteria: Pressure ≥3.5 kg/cm² at top floor hydrant; no coupling leaks

task_name: Fire alarm full system test — coordinate with FMS Committee, simulate alarm, verify all responses
acceptance_criteria: Alarm sounds at all floors; voice evacuation message audible; panel logs event
notes: Notify all departments + nursing + admin at least 24h prior

task_name: Conduct fire mock drill — test evacuation route, assembly point, response times
acceptance_criteria: All staff evacuate within 6 min; nominal headcount at assembly; gaps documented in CAPA
notes: Pair with Q13 Fire/Non-Fire Emergency Mgmt SOP

task_name: Annual extinguisher refilling/servicing by certified vendor
acceptance_criteria: All extinguishers refilled; new tag with next refill date; service certificate filed

task_name: Annual fire pump load test, churn test, motor inspection
acceptance_criteria: Pump delivers rated flow at rated head; motor amps within spec; report filed

task_name: Manifold inspection — left bank cylinder count, pressure gauge reading, chains secured
acceptance_criteria: All 3 cylinders chained; gauge reading recorded; no audible alarm on left bank

task_name: Manifold inspection — right bank cylinder count, pressure gauge reading, chains secured
acceptance_criteria: All 3 cylinders chained; gauge reading recorded; identifies which bank is active

task_name: Verify automatic changeover system status (Kumar's auto-changeover) — no fault indicators
acceptance_criteria: Active bank indicator visible; changeover unit shows no fault; alarm test panel green

task_name: Ingersoll Rand compressor #1 + #2 — running status, pressure, oil level, no leaks
acceptance_criteria: Duty unit running; standby in auto; line pressure 4–5 kg/cm²; no audible leaks

task_name: Vacuum pumps — single-stage + two-stage IR pumps — running, suction reading, no overheating
acceptance_criteria: Duty pump operational; suction ≥−500 mmHg; standby in auto; pumps cool to touch

task_name: Cylinder inventory — count full vs empty, segregation correct, replacement log updated
acceptance_criteria: Full cylinders chained on standby bank; empty cylinders in segregated zone; log signed

task_name: Portable Type-B oxygen cylinder check — pressure, regulator function, location verified
acceptance_criteria: Each Type-B cylinder ≥150 kg/cm² fill; regulator and flow meter function; in correct bay
notes: Locations: every ICU bed, OT 1/2/3, ER, ward floors per FMS.6.d

task_name: Bed head panel outlets — visual inspection of O2/Air/Vac labels, color coding, outlet integrity
acceptance_criteria: Color codes intact; outlets click-lock; no oil/grease near outlets; signage legible

task_name: MGPS zone isolation valves — visual condition, accessible, labeled, position correct
acceptance_criteria: All zone valves labeled, accessible (not blocked), in OPEN normal-operating position

task_name: Manifold area condition — ventilation, no oil/grease, no smoking signage, restricted access enforced
acceptance_criteria: Vents unblocked; no oil/grease/combustibles; signage in place; door access controlled

task_name: Functional test of MGPS audible/visual alarms — manifold panel + bedside panel alarms
acceptance_criteria: Audible alarm sounds on test; bedside panels show indicator; staff response within 5 min

task_name: Simulate left-bank depletion — verify automatic switch to right bank + alarm activation
acceptance_criteria: System switches to standby bank without supply interruption; alarm activates; reset works

task_name: Emergency inlet valve test — connect spare cylinder, verify pressure stabilization at clinical outlets
acceptance_criteria: Inlet accepts cylinder; pressure stabilizes ≥4 kg/cm² at ICU/OT/ER outlets

task_name: Compressor duty/standby switchover test — manually swap, verify standby takes load
acceptance_criteria: Standby starts within 30 sec; pressure recovers within 60 sec; both compressors run on demand

task_name: Vacuum pump duty/standby test — swap pumps, confirm continuous suction
acceptance_criteria: Standby pump assumes load; suction holds ≥−500 mmHg; no service interruption

task_name: Standalone 0.5HP/1HP vacuum pump function — power on, suction test, electrical safety
acceptance_criteria: Each standalone pump powers on; achieves suction; cord/plug intact; ELCB tests OK

task_name: Comprehensive pipeline pressure & leak test by AMC vendor; alarm + zone valve service
acceptance_criteria: Pressure stable; no leaks at joints; alarms test pass; zone valves serviced; report filed

task_name: Medical oxygen purity test — sample for analysis (≥99% O2)
acceptance_criteria: Lab report ≥99% O2 purity; CO/H2O within IS spec; certificate filed

task_name: Mock drill — simulate complete oxygen failure, deploy Type-B cylinders, document response
acceptance_criteria: Type-B cylinders deployed within 2 min; clinical staff aware of protocol; gaps logged
notes: Template exists in Drive: FMS_6d_Oxygen_Failure_Mock_Drill_Record

task_name: Annual comprehensive MGPS audit by certified vendor — full service + recertification
acceptance_criteria: Annual MGPS certification renewed; all components serviced; vendor report comprehensive

task_name: Main LT panel walk-by — voltage/current readings, no abnormal sounds, no scorching/heating
acceptance_criteria: Voltage 220–240V per phase; no humming/buzzing; panel surface cool to touch

task_name: Cummins DG #1 (250 kVA) daily check — fuel level, oil level, coolant, battery voltage, no leaks
acceptance_criteria: Fuel ≥50%; oil within dipstick range; coolant at level; battery ≥24V; no leaks

task_name: Cummins DG #2 (250 kVA) daily check — fuel level, oil level, coolant, battery voltage, no leaks
acceptance_criteria: Fuel ≥50%; oil within dipstick range; coolant at level; battery ≥24V; no leaks

task_name: UPS systems (360 kVA total) — input voltage, output voltage, battery status, fault indicators
acceptance_criteria: Input/output green; battery indicator showing charged; no fault/bypass mode

task_name: DB visual walk — locked, no scorching, no exposed wires, labels legible
acceptance_criteria: All DBs locked; no smell of burning; no exposed conductors; circuit labels readable

task_name: DG #1 + #2 weekly off-load test run (5 min each) — start, stabilize, parameters in spec
acceptance_criteria: Both DGs start within 10 sec; stable RPM/Hz; oil pressure normal; no abnormal noise
notes: Run outside peak clinical hours

task_name: Earth pit watering — pour water in all earth pits to maintain conductivity
acceptance_criteria: All earth pits watered; pit covers replaced; visual no corrosion at strip

task_name: DG monthly load test — run on full hospital load for 30 min, monitor parameters
acceptance_criteria: DG handles full load; voltage/freq stable; oil temp/pressure within range; AMF works

task_name: UPS battery health check — record cell voltages, log capacity test result
acceptance_criteria: All cell voltages within ±0.1V; battery capacity ≥80% rated; aged cells flagged

task_name: UPS auto-transfer test — kill mains briefly, confirm UPS transfer in <10ms, no equipment trip
acceptance_criteria: UPS holds load; ICU/OT/IT equipment did not reset; switchover logged
notes: Coordinate carefully — perform during low-clinical-load window

task_name: DG battery electrolyte top-up + terminal cleaning + load test (where applicable)
acceptance_criteria: Electrolyte at level; terminals clean & greased; cranking voltage holds ≥10V under load

task_name: Quarterly DG comprehensive service by AMC vendor (filters, oil change as scheduled, hoses)
acceptance_criteria: Service per OEM schedule; oil/filter change as due; service report filed

task_name: Annual electrical safety audit by Class I licensed contractor (BESCOM-mandated)
acceptance_criteria: Audit covers main panel, DBs, earthing, cable mgmt, load distribution, emergency power

task_name: Annual earth resistance measurement — all earth pits, value <1 ohm
acceptance_criteria: Earth resistance <1 ohm at each pit; readings documented; deviations flagged for CAPA

task_name: Annual DG complete overhaul + load bank test by Cummins AMC
acceptance_criteria: Full service per OEM annual schedule; load bank test at 110% rated; report filed

task_name: BWSSB municipal water — confirm supply present, valve open, no leakage at inlet
acceptance_criteria: Inlet flowing; no leaks at meter or valve; pressure adequate to fill UG tank

task_name: Underground tank level + pump operation — float switch working, pumps not dry-running
acceptance_criteria: UG tank level ≥40%; transfer pumps operate on demand; no dry-run alarm

task_name: Overhead tank level — visual + sensor, distribution lines pressurized
acceptance_criteria: OH tank ≥60%; distribution to all floors maintained; no overflow

task_name: Borewell pump operation — current draw, pressure delivery, motor temp
acceptance_criteria: Borewell pump runs without tripping; pressure ≥1 kg/cm² at UG tank fill; motor OK

task_name: Free chlorine + pH + clarity test at 3 patient-area taps
acceptance_criteria: Free chlorine 0.2–0.5 ppm; pH 6.5–8.5; visually clear; record per tap

task_name: Verify tanker supply protocol ready — tanker contact, fill point, isolation valve operational
acceptance_criteria: Tanker vendor contact current; fill connection accessible; isolation valve works

task_name: Test switchover from BWSSB to borewell — operate manual valves, verify continuity
acceptance_criteria: BWSSB isolated; borewell takes over; tank fills from borewell; restored after test

task_name: Quarterly tank cleaning + disinfection (mandated per FMS.2.d)
acceptance_criteria: Tanks emptied, scrubbed, chlorinated; restart with treated water; certificate filed
notes: FMS.2.d explicitly requires every-3-month cleaning

task_name: Comprehensive water quality test — microbial + chemical parameters by NABL lab
acceptance_criteria: All parameters within IS:10500 potable water standard; microbial absent

task_name: VRF outdoor units (Carrier + Toshiba) — running status, no error codes, fans free
acceptance_criteria: All ODUs running per zone demand; no error codes on display; fans rotate freely

task_name: OT positive pressure verification (door swing test or magnehelic if installed)
acceptance_criteria: Door swing test confirms positive pressure outward; or magnehelic ≥+15 Pa

task_name: OT temperature + humidity log (per OT)
acceptance_criteria: Temp 18–22°C; humidity 40–60% RH; logged per OT, all three

task_name: ICU temperature + humidity log (single zone)
acceptance_criteria: Temp 22–26°C; humidity 40–60% RH; logged

task_name: IDU visual sweep — 1 floor per day rotation — no leaks, no abnormal noise
acceptance_criteria: No water dripping; no rattling; supply air felt at vents

task_name: Indoor unit filter cleaning — soft brush + wash, dry, reinstall (zone rotation)
acceptance_criteria: Filters washed and reinstalled; airflow improved; recorded per IDU

task_name: OT HEPA filter pressure differential check (if magnehelic installed)
acceptance_criteria: Pressure drop within manufacturer spec; flag rising trend for filter change

task_name: Quarterly comprehensive VRF service by Carrier/Toshiba AMC — refrigerant pressure, motor checks
acceptance_criteria: Refrigerant pressures within spec; coils cleaned; AMC report filed

task_name: OT HEPA filter replacement (typical 12 months or as pressure indicates)
acceptance_criteria: HEPA filters replaced; integrity test (PAO/DOP) where applicable; certificate filed

task_name: Annual OT air quality validation — particle count, microbial, ACH, pressure differentials
acceptance_criteria: Class ISO-7 particle count; microbial absent; ACH ≥20; positive pressure verified

task_name: Lift 1 daily operation — door open/close, levelling, button response, emergency phone
acceptance_criteria: Doors operate smoothly; levels within ±10mm; all floor buttons respond; emergency phone connects

task_name: Lift 2 daily operation — door open/close, levelling, button response, emergency phone
acceptance_criteria: Doors operate smoothly; levels within ±10mm; all floor buttons respond; emergency phone connects

task_name: Lift 3 (Patient) daily operation — door open/close, stretcher fit, emergency phone, ARD function
acceptance_criteria: Stretcher loads/unloads cleanly; ARD verbal check OK; emergency phone connects

task_name: Cabin condition — flooring, walls, mirror, capacity signage, lighting
acceptance_criteria: No damage; capacity sign legible; lighting OK; floor non-slip

task_name: Monthly comprehensive lift servicing by AMC — ropes, brakes, doors, controller
acceptance_criteria: Ropes inspected (tension, wear); brakes adjusted; doors aligned; service report filed

task_name: Annual statutory lift inspection by Govt-authorized inspector (Inspectorate of Factories Karnataka)
acceptance_criteria: Inspection certificate renewed; gaps closed; certificate displayed in lift

task_name: Sluice room flush + condition check — drain unclogged, no smell, gloves available
acceptance_criteria: Drain free-flowing; no foul smell; PPE available; cleaning agents stocked

task_name: Drain inspection walk — corridor + washroom drains free-flowing, no overflow
acceptance_criteria: All drains free; no standing water; no overflow at floor traps

task_name: Drain trap flush with disinfectant (rotating zone)
acceptance_criteria: Trap flushed; disinfectant added; no foul smell post-flush

task_name: Visual sweep for leaks at exposed plumbing — under sinks, near washrooms, ceilings
acceptance_criteria: No active leaks; no staining indicating slow leaks; CAPA raised for any drips

task_name: STP plant operation check (if installed) — pumps, blowers, effluent quality
acceptance_criteria: Pumps/blowers operational; effluent visually clear; KSPCB parameters within spec
notes: Confirm with Charan whether EHRC has STP or connects to BBMP sewer line

task_name: Floor condition walk — slips, cracks, lifted tiles, water seepage
acceptance_criteria: No active hazards; CAPA raised for cracks/lifted tiles; non-slip integrity intact

task_name: Ramp condition — non-slip surface, handrails secure, no cracks
acceptance_criteria: Surface non-slip; handrails firm; gradient unobstructed; no cracks/chips

task_name: Walls + ceilings inspection — dampness, cracks, paint peeling, water marks
acceptance_criteria: No new dampness; no cracks; paint intact; ceiling tiles secure

task_name: Handrail tightness + condition check — all wall-mounted handrails in patient corridors + stairs
acceptance_criteria: All handrails firm to push/pull test; no rust; brackets secured

task_name: Grab bar tightness check — every patient room washroom + disabled WC
acceptance_criteria: All grab bars firm; brackets tight; no rust; rated load OK

task_name: External wall and roof inspection — paint, cracks, water-pooling, drainage
acceptance_criteria: No water pooling; drainage outlets clear; paint integrity OK

task_name: Annual visual structural assessment — load-bearing walls, beams, columns by qualified engineer
acceptance_criteria: No new cracks/settlement; assessment report filed; CAPA for any flagged items

task_name: Nurse call bell test — random sample 4 rooms per floor each day, button press confirmed at station
acceptance_criteria: Bell press registers at nursing station; light at door illuminates; reset works

task_name: Lockable wheel verification — random sample 4 cots per floor — brakes engage and hold
acceptance_criteria: All 4 wheels lockable; cot does not move when braked; CAPA for any failures

task_name: Bed rail latch + drop check — random sample 4 cots per floor
acceptance_criteria: Rails latch securely; drop mechanism smooth; rails hold patient weight

task_name: Wheelchair availability + condition — at main entrance + ER entrance + ICU corridor
acceptance_criteria: Minimum stock per location; brakes work; tyres inflated; foot rests intact

task_name: Directional + departmental signage walk — legible, intact, illuminated where required
acceptance_criteria: All signs present; legible; illuminated signs lit; no damage

task_name: Statutory signage display — KPME, fire NOC, no-smoking, BMW, fee schedule, patient rights
acceptance_criteria: All statutory signage current and visible at reception/billing

task_name: Fire exit signs + evacuation route signage — illuminated check during simulated power fail
acceptance_criteria: All fire-exit signs illuminate on backup; evacuation route arrows visible from anywhere

task_name: BMW storage area daily check — bins segregated by colour, no overflow, area locked, vendor pickup on schedule
acceptance_criteria: Yellow/red/blue/white containers segregated; lids closed; area secure; pickup logged

task_name: Chemical / disinfectant storage — labels intact, MSDS present, ventilation OK, restricted access enforced
acceptance_criteria: Labels legible; MSDS file present at point-of-use; vents clear; door locked

task_name: Spill kit inventory — contents per kit list, expiry dates of any reagents
acceptance_criteria: All kit components present; reagents within expiry; PPE included; placement signage in place

task_name: MSDS file presence + currency — every hazmat use area has up-to-date MSDS for each chemical
acceptance_criteria: MSDS within last 5 years; covers all chemicals stored; index page current

task_name: BMW pickup vendor visit — verify weights, lot numbers, manifest signed
acceptance_criteria: Vendor manifests signed; weight per category logged; vehicle registration verified

task_name: Mock spill drill (chemical or BMW) — staff response, kit deployment, area decontamination
acceptance_criteria: Spill identified; kit deployed within 5 min; area decontaminated; documentation filed
notes: Aligns with Code Orange SOP

task_name: CCTV operational walk-by — all cameras showing live feed, recording active, no offline cameras
acceptance_criteria: All cameras live; recording indicator on; date/time correct; no 'offline' messages

task_name: Security guard deployment + visitor pass system — guard on post, pass register active
acceptance_criteria: Guards on duty per roster; visitor pass register up to date; bag checks happening

task_name: CCTV recording integrity — pull random 24-hour playback from each zone; storage retention OK
acceptance_criteria: Random playback samples retrieve cleanly; storage not at limit; retention ≥30 days

task_name: Annual security risk assessment by multidisciplinary team — review threats, mitigation, CAPA
acceptance_criteria: Updated risk register; new mitigation actions; signed off in FMS Committee

task_name: Pest sighting log — record any sighting with location/time during daily rounds
acceptance_criteria: If no sighting, log 'nil'; sightings noted with location for vendor escalation

task_name: Monthly pest control vendor visit — bait stations, gel application, areas covered
acceptance_criteria: All zones covered per contract; bait/gel applied; vendor service report filed

task_name: Quarterly fogging treatment for mosquitos / outdoor pests
acceptance_criteria: Outdoor areas + outdoor storage fogged; report filed

task_name: Renew Fire NOC before expiry
acceptance_criteria: Renewed certificate received; previous expiry not yet hit; lead-time milestones logged
notes: Lead-time triggers: 180d yellow, 90d orange, 30d red, expired critical

task_name: Renew Consent for Operation (CFO) + BMW authorization
acceptance_criteria: Renewed certificate received; previous expiry not yet hit; lead-time milestones logged
notes: Lead-time triggers: 180d yellow, 90d orange, 30d red, expired critical

task_name: Renew KPME hospital registration
acceptance_criteria: Renewed certificate received; previous expiry not yet hit; lead-time milestones logged
notes: Lead-time triggers: 180d yellow, 90d orange, 30d red, expired critical

task_name: Renew BMW handler authorization
acceptance_criteria: Renewed certificate received; previous expiry not yet hit; lead-time milestones logged
notes: Lead-time triggers: 180d yellow, 90d orange, 30d red, expired critical

task_name: Renew narcotics handling licence
acceptance_criteria: Renewed certificate received; previous expiry not yet hit; lead-time milestones logged
notes: Lead-time triggers: 180d yellow, 90d orange, 30d red, expired critical

task_name: Renew CT scanner radiation licence + RSO requirements
acceptance_criteria: Renewed certificate received; previous expiry not yet hit; lead-time milestones logged
notes: Lead-time triggers: 180d yellow, 90d orange, 30d red, expired critical

task_name: Renew PCPNDT licence (if USG/imaging)
acceptance_criteria: Renewed certificate received; previous expiry not yet hit; lead-time milestones logged
notes: Lead-time triggers: 180d yellow, 90d orange, 30d red, expired critical

task_name: Renew BBMP Trade Licence
acceptance_criteria: Renewed certificate received; previous expiry not yet hit; lead-time milestones logged
notes: Lead-time triggers: 180d yellow, 90d orange, 30d red, expired critical

task_name: Renew lift fitness certificate
acceptance_criteria: Renewed certificate received; previous expiry not yet hit; lead-time milestones logged
notes: Lead-time triggers: 180d yellow, 90d orange, 30d red, expired critical

task_name: Annual electrical safety audit certificate
acceptance_criteria: Renewed certificate received; previous expiry not yet hit; lead-time milestones logged
notes: Lead-time triggers: 180d yellow, 90d orange, 30d red, expired critical

task_name: Periodic structural safety certificate (typically 5-yearly)
acceptance_criteria: Renewed certificate received; previous expiry not yet hit; lead-time milestones logged
notes: Lead-time triggers: 180d yellow, 90d orange, 30d red, expired critical

task_name: Facility Manager daily inspection round — covers all systems above + housekeeping + safety
acceptance_criteria: Round documented in FMSTracker; all flagged items raised in Even Bell or app
notes: Per FMS.1.c: 'Facility Manager should do daily rounds' — Charan's responsibility

task_name: Unit Head monthly inspection round — joint with FMS Committee + Quality
acceptance_criteria: Round documented; CAPA assigned for findings; presented at FMS Committee
notes: Per FMS.1.c: 'Monthly rounds should be done by Unit Head'

task_name: Monthly FMS Committee meeting — review rounds, CAPAs, downtime, statutory status, audits
acceptance_criteria: Meeting held; minutes filed; CAPA register reviewed; statutory dashboard reviewed
